title: Safe clause
doc_html:
§4720.146.  Safe clause

The Legislature of Louisiana hereby finds, determines, and declares that this Chapter is necessary for the immediate preservation of the public peace, health, and safety.

Acts 2007, No. 390, §1, eff. July 10, 2007.
